LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS BOSTON PROPERTIES, INC AND BOSTON PROPERTIES MANAGEMENT, INC'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DENIED. BY ALLEGING THAT NUMEROUS OTHER SLIPS AND FALLS OCCURRED DUE TO THE SAME DANGEROUS CONDITION AND THAT DEFENDANTS WERE AWARE OF THOSE INCIDENTS AND FAILED TO REMEDY THE DANGEROUS CONDITION, PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENTLY PLED HIS REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. DEFENDANT HAS 10 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-21-2012 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Jun-14-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2012 Set For Trial On Sep-17-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William Hurley, Esq., from Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP, 415-362-8580, for Defendant and moving party
Dan G. Berris, Esq., from Guy Kornblum & Associates, 415-440-7800 x-220 for Plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS BOSTON PROPERTIES, INC. AND BOSTON PROPERTIES MANAGEMENT, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Denied. By alleging that numerous other slips and falls ccurred due to the same dangerous condition and that defendants were aware of those incidents and failed to remedy the dangerous condition, plaintiff has sufficiently pled his request for punitive damages. Defendant has 10 days leave to answer. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-02-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BOSTON PROPERTIES, INC., BOSTON PROPERTIES MANAGEMENT, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR PER THE REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

MINI MINUTES:
